top_signals.title: VW CEO Under Pressure as Labor Unions Torpedo Turnaround Plan
top_signals.summary: Volkswagen AG Chief Executive Officer Oliver Blume faces an uphill battle to push through a fundamental overhaul of the carmaker after failing to win initial backing from the supervisory board.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
